description: Back in Los Angeles, Wilfred Malick is approached by the Chronicom Luke, who reveals they have a common enemy in S.H.I.E.L.D. Luke offers Malick instructions to prevent Hydra’s destruction by working together against the agents from the future, cementing a new alliance.

transcript.line: Oh, not necessary, Mr. Malick. I have been left behind to help you.
You're the man who called, told me Sousa was on the train.
You and I share an enemy, Mr. Malick. The only difference is that mine is from the future.
I think I might've met one of them.
You certainly did. As it is certain S.H.I.E.L.D. will destroy all you have built. It is time to prevent that.
By doing exactly... what I say.
